<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current objects:")
for node in seg:
    b = node['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if node['color'] not in ['O', 'w']:
        print(f"  {node['color']}: row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}], pixels={node['pixels']}")

# Check adjacency
adj = current_frame.segmentation['adjacency_list']
print("\nAdjacency (b-Y):")
for pair in adj:
    i, j = pair
    ci = seg[i]['color']
    cj = seg[j]['color']
    if ci in ['b', 'Y'] or cj in ['b', 'Y']:
        print(f"  {ci}({i}) - {cj}({j})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
